programme.desc: As Derek prepares for his move to DC, Meredith keeps herself busy at the hospital. Meanwhile, Jackson and April deal with difficult news, and Arizona and Amelia discuss how to best approach Dr. Herman.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Bed's Too Big Without You
programme.desc: April stays optimistic as Arizona begins testing on her baby; Dr. Herman plans out a crash course in fetal surgery; and Owen and Callie encourage each other to get back into the dating scene.

programme.title: The Closer: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Brenda starts an investigation when severed body parts are found in the dumpster. The victim is a popular porn star who also happens to have HIV+. Many of the co-stars may have also been exposed to HIV.

programme.title: The Closer: Critical Missing
programme.desc: A woman and her young daughter bob up, tied together from the bottom of the harbour. The team has to reverse their usual methods of solving crimes and work their way backwards in this strange mystery.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Santa finds himself on the naughty list after robbing a bank, but a Santa flash mob complicates his apprehension and the Major Crimes unit scrambles to figure out how things went so wrong. Sharon's kids come to town for the holidays.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: Tensions are high when Flynn has to talk down a man precariously holding on to the ledge of a bridge, only to find out that the jumper is a sex offender with a dead body in his car. Old wounds are opened as Rusty prepares an impact statement.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: Sanchez is put under the microscope when his mother's caregiver is found murdered. Rusty is forced to take on Jack when he shows up at Sharon's condo acting recklessly.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Special Master
programme.desc: Phillip Stroh returns and is demanding a new deal from DDA Rios in exchange for his cooperation regarding 'future murders.' In a race against the clock to prevent three deaths, Major Crimes works to save the victims while decoding Stroh's information.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Special Master
programme.desc: The Major Crimes division is in overdrive working to stop a serial killer who has been targeting female sex workers. To interpret the facts, Captain Sharon Raydor reaches outside her division to a consultant to help reverse engineer a decade of murders.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When Mary Ann Langley finds her husband James nearly burned to death in their home, investigators must race to determine if it was an accident or assault before they lose him.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: Sandee Rozzo is preparing to face her attacker at court when she’s gunned down in her garage. The culprit seems obvious, but as detectives dig deeper, they learn nothing about this case is cut and dry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Big Easy Black Widow
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, resources are depleted. When a Pastor turns up dead outside of his New Orleans apartment, his case, along with countless others, goes cold, until his wife's next husband turns up dead as well.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm
programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Brutal Obsession

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sex Slaves in Texas

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sacrament of Blood
programme.desc: Behind the cloak of his 'religion,' a Santeria priest allegedly murdered his lover, raped a minor and molested his step-daughter.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: No Way Out
programme.desc: Authorities and the family of a young girl do not believe her when she tells them that she is being raped by her stepfather. A grudge fight escalates until one man shoots the other with three friends as witnesses.

programme.desc: Josh travels worldwide to uncover the myths behind Christopher Columbus.

programme.title: Expedition: Back to the Future: DeLorean Debacle
programme.desc: Josh Gates and Christopher Lloyd track down Bob Gale, creator of Back to the Future, and discover that their hunt for a Time Machine will take them to a super-fan's collection in Massachusetts and DeLorean's HQ in Texas.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Back to the Future Part 2
programme.desc: On a mission to hunt down the original DeLorean Time Machine from Back to the Future, Josh Gates and Christopher Lloyd pursue a hot lead in Orlando, but a huge problem might derail their quest and leave Michael J. Fox without his famous ride.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul to pursue the True Cross of Christ.

programme.desc: On a mission to hunt down the original DeLorean Time Machine from Back to the Future, Josh Gates and Christopher Lloyd pursue a hot lead in Orlando, but a huge problem might derail their quest and leave Michael J. Fox without his famous ride.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Chupacabra
programme.desc: In the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico, Josh Gates tracks a possible Chupacabra.

programme.desc: Drew visits a 12th-Century cathedral and an aviation museum.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Ripley Castle Decorative Salvage Fair
programme.desc: Drew visits the Ripley Castle Decorative Salvage Fair and an art collection in a seaside town.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Hungarian Finds
programme.desc: Drew and Tea visit the flea markets and former communist factories in Hungary.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers: Fairground Valuables
programme.desc: A fairground ride is revived, and Martin works on an old suitcase.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers: Man vs. Machine
programme.desc: A large oak table is restored.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake Shattered
programme.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground while Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse and Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Volcano's Edge
programme.desc: The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow. First they must bring life back to the property, then figure out how to make the structures mobile in case of another eruption.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Under Siege

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Tools of the Trade: Self-Reliance Gone Wrong
programme.desc: The Raneys try to give a couple of young dog mushers the tools to protect their homestead from the wildlife and the wild, but first they must gain their trust.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Tools of the Trade: Water
programme.desc: A family in the Nevada desert desperately needs the tools to survive the searing heat and sandstorms. Their most serious deficit, though, is water. Marty's ready to risk everything to save them.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Tools of the Trade: Impossible Road
programme.desc: A homestead nestled at the bottom of a 100-foot cliff needs some serious hardware to help them reach the four acres they need for their food and livestock.

programme.title: Germophobia: Germophobia
programme.desc: Washing hands 80 times a day, wrapping car seats in plastic, making guests wear hazmat suits and roasting in a hot sauna to kill bacteria before sex are just some of the ways Brian, Keshius and Toni navigate life with their Germophobia.

programme.desc: Gerard has nearly a hundred lumps varying in size that coat his entire body. Gina has bloody lesions all over, and nobody has been able to help her. Eric has a large bump on his head that that he calls his "on/off button."

programme.desc: Joanne has been held back from success because of her forehead growth. Shakisaha split her left earlobe after stretching it with gauges. Mike is a tough guy with a soft bump on his head. Dania's rhinophyma has kept her from enjoying her life.

programme.desc: Myrka struggles with breastfeeding. Julie reveals some shocking news. Lilly and Lawrence announce their engagement to their families. Matt worries Aden doesn't have what it takes to support Jenna in the delivery room.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: A Hoarder
programme.desc: Raine struggles to clear her house of clutter before her baby is born, but it isn't easy. She suffers from hoarding, but knows that despite her compulsion, it is crucial for her baby's safety to clean up her act before the birth of her son.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Have OCD
programme.desc: Jenna's life is dominated by her OCD, with her second child on the way; she struggles with a condition that dictates her marriage and young son's life.

programme.title: Birth Moms
programme.desc: Follow the lives of three pregnant women living at an adoption center in Utah and meet the prospective parents.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: My Pregnant Husband
programme.desc: Ari and Caitlin and Myles and Precious experience the joy of a transgender pregnancy when Ari and Myles, the men in their relationships, become pregnant. The couples must conquer unique obstacles when the person carrying and birthing their child is a man.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby at a Rest Stop
programme.desc: A cross-country move takes a major detour when the young wife, not knowing that she is pregnant, goes into labour at a deserted interstate rest area.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby on a Bath Mat
programme.desc: After suffering a painful miscarriage five months earlier, Reesa collapsed and fell into a coma. At the hospital, doctors learn that she was carrying twins and only miscarried one fetus.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in My Sweatpants
programme.desc: Emily fears her appendix has burst and her mother rushes her to the emergency room, but before Emily can get out of the back seat, something slides down the leg of her pants.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby at the Mall
programme.desc: While working a retail job, Yanil suffers excruciating abdominal pain. She lies down in a stockroom to ride it out, and is shocked to find a baby crowning between her legs.

programme.title: Obese and Expecting
programme.desc: Four moms-to-be who are morbidly obese challenge the odds on their journey to motherhood.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Bethany's Story
programme.desc: Bethany has two daughters who live in fear of losing their mom to her food addiction. Once an addiction counselor, Bethany has gotten so big than she can no longer work. Now she risks losing her life, if Dr. Now can't help curb her addiction.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley T's Story
programme.desc: Ashley is 24 and lives alone. Her only sources of comfort are food and the relationships she has online. But not a single one of her profiles is real. Soon, Ashley learns that Dr. Now isn't someone she can lie to like her online friends.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Randy's Story
programme.desc: At 650lbs, Randy's food addiction led to the loss of his marriage and visits with his daughter. To regain control of his life, he endures a rigorous pre-surgery diet, surrounded by fast-food temptations.

programme.desc: Dr. Teresa Sievers, a rising social media star, was found bludgeoned to death in her kitchen. Detectives began to focus on her husband Mark, who had taken out a large life insurance policy on his wife.

programme.title: Killer Cases: Killing Momma
programme.desc: 'Dee Dee' Blanchard was found murdered face down in the bedroom of her home just outside Springfield, Missouri in June 2015.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: Katie Magbanua
programme.desc: When a college professor is executed in Tallahassee, Florida, a hitman for hire scheme is suspected. The woman who allegedly helped set it up takes the stand in her own defense.

programme.title: Cellmates Secrets: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: Casey Anthony's former jail mate reveals how the two forged a deep friendship until she realized that her Casey was actually the person everyone warned her about. Plus, a prison guard reveals how meeting Casey wreaked havoc on her life.

programme.title: Cellmates Secrets: Drew Peterson
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Drew's ex-fiancé reveals a shocking revelation relating to his fourth wife, Stacy's, disappearance.

programme.title: The First 48: Rearview Killer/ Point Blank
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a parking lot drug deal turns into a shootout that leaves two men dead. In Tulsa, an execution outside a motel escalates into a double murder when the killer spots a witness.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: The Cube: The World's Toughest Gameshow
programme.desc: Dwyane Wade introduces The Cube, 15 square feet of steel-edged plexiglass where simple tasks become epic challenges! The teams have 9 lives to win 7 games in order to beat The Cube for a chance to walk away with $250,000.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Andy Richter
programme.desc: Andy Richter challenges the chefs to recreate the delectable fish and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Amanda Seales
programme.desc: The three chefs aim to recreate Taco Bell's Cheesy Gordita Crunch for Amanda Seales.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Death
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam explains that 'the end' is inevitable, shows why immortality is a fantasy, and reveals that the American funeral industry is a racket that exploits mourners' grief and fear of dying.

programme.desc: Adam hits the gridiron to show why the playoffs rarely determine which team is best, and he explores how sports drink hydration myths are putting kids at risk.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Take the Mirror
programme.desc: Michael's candy shop customers witness a live scorpion get freed from a lollipop, and later, Michael's cocktail invention has one man drunk with envy. In the big finish, a cursed mirror turns simple reflections into reality.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sierra Volcano
programme.desc: Michael performs a revolutionary skin treatment that turns back time, and at the farmer's market, a pungent pre-historic cheese mesmerizes one shopper's taste buds. Plus, an accident with a 3D printer has Michael meeting his match.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Doughy Parts
programme.desc: At an office, Michael goes from suave to slacker in the blink of an eye. Then at a museum, a man discovers his painter's touch is worth thousands, and at a pool club, Michael and his strange friend are in the deep end with security.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Todd and Chase are forced to experience the great outdoors when Grayson insists on going camping. While the guys 'rough it' in a luxury RV and terrify Grayson with stories of a haunted lake, Savannah and Julie must go back to driving school.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Houseguest From Hell
programme.desc: Todd's home life is turned upside down when Julie’s pregnant and very demanding friend comes over to stay a few days. Also, Todd tries to bridge the gap between himself and his oldest daughter Lindsie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Still Chrisley After All These Years
programme.desc: Julie and Todd decide to celebrate their wedding anniversary by throwing a charity event to raise money for breast cancer. When someone mixes up the dates, however, it’s a mad scramble to try to pull off the biggest party of the year.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Savannah's Big ID-EA
programme.desc: When an influential Southern magazine asks The Chrisleys for an interview about all things fashion, Todd insists on trying to control the situation by writing a script for his family to memorize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Life's a Pitch
programme.desc: Todd thinks that he's saving the day when he steps in to coach Grayson's baseball team, but when he discovers he's in way over his head, he must figure out a way to regain the respect (and control) of these overzealous 9 year olds.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Getting Testy
programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: My Chrisley Valentine
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Chase is dating several different girls on Valentine's Day, he recruits Savannah to help teach his son a lesson about respecting women.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Savannah has a rose coloured view of what her spending habits will look like when she goes off to college.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys on Campus
programme.desc: When the Chrisleys take a road trip to Nashville to tour a college campus, Todd is excited for the additional family bonding time. Savannah tries to gain independence and go out with new friends, but Todd goes to the extreme and crashes her big night out.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End
programme.desc: The family buries a time capsule to commemorate their years on Keeping Up. Kim updates the family on her future, Khloé must decide whether to move to Boston to be with Tristan, and Kourtney finally gives Scott some clarity about their romantic future.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Out of the Frying Pan
programme.desc: Samantha deals with losing her hair; Miranda moves to Brooklyn; Charlotte gets a dog.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Cold War
programme.desc: Samantha circulates a steamy video to stop rumours; Charlotte enters her dog in a show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Splat!
programme.desc: Petrovsky makes an announcement at the tension-filled dinner party he throws for Carrie.

programme.title: Sex and the City: An American Girl in Paris (Part Une)
programme.desc: Carrie grows lonely in Paris, while Big sets out to bring her back into his life.

programme.title: Sex and the City: An American Girl in Paris (Part Deux)
programme.desc: Carrie encounters Big after a falling-out with Petrovsky; Steve's mother has a stroke.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Things Fall Apart: Covid-19
programme.desc: As L.A. prepares for a potential lockdown, Khloe falls ill and worries that she may have Covid-19. Malika goes into labor and cannot bring her support system to the hospital.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Losing it in Lockdown
programme.desc: Kim struggles to balance work life and mom life in quarantine, while Khloe gets creative to keep herself entertained. The family encourages Kendall and Kylie to reconcile after their argument in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love Lockdown
programme.desc: Khloe feels pressured to make a decision about her romantic future with Tristan. Scott heads to a treatment center to work on his health, but is betrayed when the facility leaks photos of him.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Beginnings and Endings
programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Winners Take All
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe think old flames are brewing between Kourtney and Scott and take it upon themselves to set them up on a romantic date. The Kardashian girls challenge the Jenners to an obstacle course. Kris and Corey agree to abstain from sex.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: New Friends and The Bunker
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are curious about Kourtney's new friend, Addison Rae. Scared by the state of the world, Kim takes measures to prepare for the future, while Kris is afraid to let her mom celebrate her birthday during a pandemic.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Great Ex-pectations
programme.desc: Kourtney sets boundaries with her Poosh team when the line between business and friendship becomes blurred. Caitlyn reaches out to Kris for some help with a business venture. Khloe and Tristan have an unexplainable experience while searching for aliens.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Summer of Love
programme.desc: Scott finally admits he's still in love with Kourtney. Khloè sets out in search of a homeless man who made a lasting impact on her years ago. Kim enlists the help of a professional to make her TikTok dancing debut.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End of an Era
programme.desc: The family makes a big decision about the future of the show and reflects on how Keeping Up will truly be an end of an era. Kris goes on a girls’ trip to decompress from the decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Season of Change
programme.desc: Khloè runs into some unexpected obstacles while exploring surrogacy. Scott worries that the family will drift apart now that the show is coming to an end. Kim is determined to figure out who is behind the satirical social media page NorisBlackBook.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up with the Kids
programme.desc: When Tristan realizes that Khloe is stressed about her living situation, he takes steps to make her feel more comfortable. Scott feels compelled to share some of his most sentimental moments from the show with his kids.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Superstar Tournament Part 2
programme.desc: In part two, the theme is budget battle royale. The seven remaining celebrity chefs are each given $36.01 to buy their groceries, but they must choose which round to use it in. In the end, one chef goes home and six move a step closer.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Superstar Tournament Part 3
programme.desc: In the third leg of the Guy's Superstars Tournament, the remaining six chefs are all given the same grocery list, but must compete in three one-on-one battles to see who makes the best breakfast, lunch or dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Superstar Tournament Part 4
programme.desc: It's the semifinals of the Guy's Grocery Games: Superstars Tournament and Guy has devised two shocking shopping cart games for the five remaining celebrity chefs. First, they must search the store to discover where Guy has hidden their personal cart.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Superstar Tournament Finale
programme.desc: It's the finale of the Triple G Superstars Tournament and the final four celebrity chefs are all vying to become the champion. But first they must face Guy's most diabolical challenge yet: The Double Wheel o' Games.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: Exotic Meats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri sends three chefs on an adventure in their own homes with an outrageous Flavortown delivery box filled with exotic meats. In round one, the chefs choose their wild game with a risky game of wild cards.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Restaurant Teams
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows that there's nothing like the teamwork in a busy restaurant's kitchen, so he invites three teams of phenomenal chefs to represent their restaurants in Flavortown.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Dads and their Kids
programme.desc: Three chef dads from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives team up with their kids to take on some of Guy Fieri's most brain-twisting games.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16 Minute Meals: Family Favorites
programme.desc: It's family favorite 16-minute meals all the way. There's Chicken Mozzarella Pasta for a quick dinner, a snappy Cowboy Chopped Salad, then fast and fabulous French Bread Pizzas with six different toppings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of 16 Minute: Spicy

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Double Lot Limbo

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Beachside Beauty
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Torrance, California, that's just miles from the ocean and several upscale beach communities. The yard is small and tiered, but buyers in this area demand luxury and are willing to pay top dollar to get it.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Bursting at the Seams
programme.desc: Jeremy and Dayna's suburban bungalow was plenty big when it was just the two of them, but four kids later their crowded house is bursting at the seams.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Infringing Flip
programme.desc: A seller is looking to offload a three-bedroom, two-bathroom home in Garden Grove, CA, and asks Tarek and Christina to come have a look. The home already has an open floor plan and a master bedroom, but one of its bedrooms may be illegally permitted.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Rock Bottom Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a good lead on a 1500 sq. ft. house in Whittier, CA. The home is dirty and dated, with a large fireplace in the center that will cost a fortune to update. They struggle to find a happy medium between design cost and profitability.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Hoarding Potential
programme.desc: Flipping team Tarek and Christina purchase and flip dilapidated properties.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Post-Purchase Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted about a three-bedroom, two-bathroom home in Anaheim, California. The home appears to be in great shape and already has some major renovations completed, but the owner doesn't know how much they want to sell it for.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Rotten Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a gamble on a million-dollar possibility in Anaheim Hills, CA, that is rotted with mold. Tarek wrestles with keeping the project on track while Christina tip-toes around her ex being in a bad mood.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Lessons in Laguna Beach
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in an upscale neighbourhood in Laguna Beach. Even though the house is small, it has an ocean view, which means big money. However, having never flipped in the area, they aren't sure what to offer for the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: False Start Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted about a home in El Monte, California, but they can't look at the inside before making an offer. After checking the exterior, they make an offer and get it for a good price, but think twice after they get inside the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Broken Flip

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Bursting at the Seams

programme.title: Snapped: Cindy Campbell Ray

programme.title: Snapped: Wendi Mae Davidson
programme.desc: When an airman from Lee, Maine vanishes only four months into his marriage to a country girl from West Texas, it triggers a multi-agency investigation that exposes a darker side to southern hospitality.

programme.title: Snapped: Sarah Vercauteren

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Chicago's Tower of Terror
programme.desc: When the innovative design of an iconic Chicago skyscraper leads to tragedy, experts must apply cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering methods to fix an urgent, life-or-death problem.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Boston's Big Dig Disaster
programme.desc: Boston's Big Dig was one of the most ambitious engineering projects in history, but in 2006, a fatal collapse in one of its tunnels put the ambitious project in doubt; experts reveal what caused this engineering disaster and how it was fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Mayhem in Minneapolis
programme.desc: A deadly design flaw results in a horrifying rush hour bridge collapse that tragically leaves 13 dead in Minneapolis. Using the latest science, experts investigate to reveal what went so catastrophically wrong on one of Minnesota's busiest crossings.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sinkhole at the Museum
programme.desc: A massive sinkhole swallows millions of dollars of legendary automobiles at the National Corvette Museum in Kentucky. Expert geologists investigate and reveal how an enormous cave system could remain undetected and poised for catastrophic destruction.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Mars Rover Declassified
programme.desc: The Rosalind Franklin Mars rover is a brand-new space mission to discover hard evidence of extraterrestrial life. Special access reveals how engineers and experts are making a new age in exploration possible.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Largest Crane Vessel
programme.desc: The largest semi-submersible crane vessel in the world pushes the limits of engineering possibilities, and with its two record-breaking cranes, it's one of the most complex ships ever constructed and redefines how we build at sea.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sinkhole at the Museum
programme.desc: A massive sinkhole swallows millions of dollars of legendary automobiles at the National Corvette Museum in Kentucky. Expert geologists investigate and reveal how an enormous cave system could remain undetected and poised for catastrophic destruction.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Mars Rover Declassified
programme.desc: The Rosalind Franklin Mars rover is a brand-new space mission to discover hard evidence of extraterrestrial life. Special access reveals how engineers and experts are making a new age in exploration possible.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Largest Crane Vessel
programme.desc: The largest semi-submersible crane vessel in the world pushes the limits of engineering possibilities, and with its two record-breaking cranes, it's one of the most complex ships ever constructed and redefines how we build at sea.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Mayhem in Minneapolis
programme.desc: A deadly design flaw results in a horrifying rush hour bridge collapse that tragically leaves 13 dead in Minneapolis. Using the latest science, experts investigate to reveal what went so catastrophically wrong on one of Minnesota's busiest crossings.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Temple of Terror
programme.desc: A mysterious explosion rocks the streets in Cambodia and it may be linked to a temple complex. Motorcyclists encounter what may be a legendary humanoid cannibal, and a cursed mineshaft could explain paranormal activity in a town's antique center.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Possessed by an Alien
programme.desc: When footage reveals a man's leg taking on a life of its own, it appears that something alien is trying to burst free; cutting-edge science investigates what explains this strange and sinister possession, and what it takes to exorcise the invader inside.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of Satan's Crown
programme.desc: A bizarre explosion is captured that morphs into a sinister black ring of smoke above a California football stadium; experts investigate and uncover an underground network of Satanists with connections to a string of modern-day terrorist plots.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Exorcist Effect
programme.desc: A boy who can twist his head 180 degrees and face directly behind him resembles infamous accounts of demonic possession from horror films; experts use cutting-edge technology to find out what's giving him this extreme ability.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Mystery of the Face Parasite
programme.desc: A man sees a doctor complaining of agonizing facial pain, and when they investigate, they discover a strange parasitic species living deep in the man's nose; footage of the grisly encounter reveals what happened next.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in Paradise
programme.desc: A bizarre, tentacled black mass emerges from the seas on an island in the Caribbean, and on-lookers are horrified as it writhes ashore; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate the origin of this alien invader.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: The Eyeball Killer
programme.desc: Cops use their street smarts to find a killer who leaves women brutally murdered with their eyeballs surgically removed.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Out of Lies
programme.desc: Lethbridge Police Detective Ryan Stef pushes his investigative creativity to the limit as he tries to solve the vicious murder of an innocent grandmother.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Lady of the Lake
programme.desc: Florence and Mark Unger love nothing more than vacationing at the lake with their two boys. Life is perfect, until an old sports injury pulls Mark into the depths of painkiller addiction. To keep her family afloat, Florence does whatever is necessary.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Move Out
programme.desc: Kiana Marshall, her brother Corey, and their friend Alexis are murdered. Now, bodycam and CCTV capture the hunt for their insane killer. Twisted tales lead detectives on a wild goose chase, but the killers are revealed and must face the consequences.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: She Set Me Up
programme.desc: Evansville, Indiana Police rely on an unlikely source of information as they search for the person responsible for shooting 28-year-old D'Angelo White. Cryptic clues left by the victim himself challenge the investigative skills of veteran detectives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: In 1995, a beloved mother is found raped and murdered in the accounting office where she works. The bloody body of her young daughter is nearby. But as police photograph the scene, they get the shock of their careers.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Carlie
programme.desc: February 1st 2004. 11-year-old Carlie Brucia disappears while walking home from a friend's house. Police discover security camera footage of her shocking abduction and the inquiry becomes a manhunt.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: She Set Me Up
programme.desc: Evansville, Indiana Police rely on an unlikely source of information as they search for the person responsible for shooting 28-year-old D'Angelo White. Cryptic clues left by the victim himself challenge the investigative skills of veteran detectives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: In 1995, a beloved mother is found raped and murdered in the accounting office where she works. The bloody body of her young daughter is nearby. But as police photograph the scene, they get the shock of their careers.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: In September 2015, Edward Lowry is found savagely beaten and stabbed to death in a parking lot in South Dakota. With little evidence left behind at the scene, can police painstakingly piece together Ed's last moments from CCTV to find his killer?

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Go in There
programme.desc: Beverly Puccio is brutally murdered and found at home by an oddly behaving ex-boyfriend. Detectives use security and traffic cam footage to piece together the last night of her life including an encounter with a mysterious stranger to find her killer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He Seems Perfect
programme.desc: Budding New York fashion designer Jenae Aragosa falls hard for bartender Trevor Frederick. But as a dark side of her new man comes to light, Jenae comes to realize she'll be lucky if she makes it out of this relationship alive.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Secret Rage
programme.desc: For 17-year-old Sarah Wisnosky, college is all about new experiences. So when she catches the eye of a flirty frat boy, she's happy to play along. But soon, she discovers he's hiding a dark secret. Can Sarah break things off before it's too late?

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Looking for Love
programme.desc: Friends discover the lifeless body of good-natured Vietnam vet Drexelle McBride in the driver's seat of his white van. Leads are scarce, until Detective Rod Demery charts the victim's final hours, and learns of a chance meeting gone terribly awry.

programme.title: Redrum: An Almost Perfect Plan
programme.desc: In rural Alabama, a police officer found his brother murdered on New Years Day.

programme.title: Redrum: The Girl in the Shower
programme.desc: Jayme Austin is a loving mother living in the Oregon countryside. When she doesn't show up for work one morning, the community begins a search but investigators fear the worst. As they look into her past, they find many possible motives and suspects.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda's only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition. Then a 29-year-old man moves back to Colorado Springs, but at his welcome home party he winds up shot execution-style.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Confession
programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds. Then an unprecedented discovery spurs police to open up a century old murder investigation.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Rumors in the Halls
programme.desc: Suspicion lands close to home when 17-year-old prom queen Aquilla Flood is found dead in her bedroom. Her family faces tough questions, while Aquilla's friends point detectives to three young men.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Ride With the Devil
programme.desc: 26-year-old car dealer Christopher O'Brien takes a strange man for a test drive and never returns. Did O'Brien's criminal past finally catch up with him? Or is the truth something more sinister?

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: I Am Vanessa
programme.desc: Vanessa Guillen was thrilled to join the Army in 2018. But something changed while she was stationed at Fort Hood. Vanessa confessed to a family member she was being harassed by a superior, but she never revealed his name.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: I Am Vanessa
programme.desc: Vanessa Guillen was thrilled to join the Army in 2018. But something changed while she was stationed at Fort Hood. Vanessa confessed to a family member she was being harassed by a superior, but she never revealed his name.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: Web of Lies: In Dark Corners
programme.desc: Vulnerable mother of five Laura Simonson seeks comfort in the online world of sexual bondage. Lured by a mysterious user named 'Mr. Handcuffs,' Laura doesn't know that she's walking straight into his twisted trap.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines
programme.desc: Man created flying devices in order to travel the world and fly into space. Learn about Apollo 11 and how it came home with the help of a pen and about Air Force One, which is not a machine, but a code name.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the stories of Pocahontas, Lewis and Clark and the women's suffrage movement.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Learn that our Halloween's origins aren't all that ancient and that Edgar Allan Poe is not the madman that others have made him out to be.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: The Mob Enforcer: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: See the story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Custom Contemporary
programme.desc: Matt and Jen want to tear out their old deck and rebuild their backyard to match the hill country modern vibe they love and give them a place to enjoy quality family time.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ponds Have More Fun
programme.desc: A Texas family wants a one-of-a-kind, natural-looking cocktail pool. The guys prove they are masters of the country pond when they build an expansive creek waterfall, natural rock steps, sunken boulders and custom concealed skimmers.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cabanas and Cannonballs
programme.desc: A couple who recently moved into a new house in Austin, Texas, has decided it's finally time to build the family pool of their kids' dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Georgia Peach Pool Paradise
programme.desc: The Parrish family has saved their whole lives to build a tropical pool paradise in the heart of Georgia. But not everything is peachy on this build when hard soil and a complicated lazy river design present major challenges for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cancun in Every Corner
programme.desc: The kings pull out all the stops to maximize an Orange County family's backyard. The shady and dated space is transformed into a three-tiered vacation paradise the family can enjoy at home.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Strawberry to Silver Dollar
programme.desc: The Brandywine Strawberry Festival in Pennsylvania is home to 'The Colossalo,' a crab cake/roast beef combo that has host Noah Cappe going wild. Other favourites include The Sizzler, the chicken parm'wich and strawberry kettle corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: You've Got Ale
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Wisconsin State Fair, where a local brewery is serving the ultimate deep-fried combo of beer, brats and cheese curds.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grill Bill
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Great Lakes to visit the Barry County Fair.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fired Up
programme.desc: Roger Mooking runs down 15 of the best fire- and smoke-kissed dishes across the U.S., including all the pork, beef, chicken and flaming desserts. Also, chefs offer recipes and more on how to cook over an open flame.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: From an Arizona joint's chicken fried steak smothered in gravy to sweet, fluffy doughnuts in Rhode Island, we are getting in line to find dishes that diners don't mind waiting hours to sink their teeth into.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Chowin' Down the Mississippi River
programme.desc: The best eats along the banks of America's greatest river are highlighted, from jazz-inspired barbecue and mouth-watering meatloaf to seafood-smothered fried green tomatoes and garden-fresh ratatouille.

programme.title: Food Boats
programme.desc: Chef Jordan Andino celebrates the burgeoning food boat trend all across America's oceans, inter-coastals and lakes. The tour includes tropical pizzas in St. Thomas and waffle cones in Virginia Beach as well as shrimp BLTs and crab cakes in Florida.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger Mooking loves a great sandwich, and searches the country for the top 15 sandwiches.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pub Grub
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes on a pub crawl to find 15 of the best dishes to go with any drink. Chicken wings, nachos, sliders, apps and mains, they're all here. Chefs share insider tips and tricks for making the very best, tastiest bar fare.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roasting and Ranching in Texas
programme.desc: Roger takes a trip to West Point, Texas to meet Tink Pinkard, an outdoor guide and all-around nice guy.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Global Flavors of Texas
programme.desc: Today, Roger is making his way through Texas for live-fire Latin American cooking and smoked European-style sausages.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rib-a-Licious
programme.desc: Roger's on the hunt for lip-smacking barbecue ribs and he found two places where the racks of meat stack up to perfection.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Crawfish to California
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes coastal at the Louisiana Crawfish Festival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize
programme.desc: Noah gets busy with the" Soul on a Roll" sandwich, and the "To Die For" casserole. Salted caramel apple gelato is the thing to beat the heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Golden State to Gizzards
programme.desc: Beginning in California and ending in Michigan, Noah Cappe explores creative carnival eats like the jalapeno cheese skirt burger and deep fried gizzards.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie and Sunday Dinner Sundaes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off at the Big E in West Springfield, Mass., where he 'meats up' with a deconstructed Turducken Sandwich and the award-winning country fried shepherd's pie.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dumplings & Pumpkins
programme.desc: Noah's first stop is at the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee, where he feels the burn with dead heat tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat and Mandarins
programme.desc: Noah gets hot for the smokin' okra burger at the Eastern Carolina Agricultural Fair in Florence, SC. Then he launches into atomic habanero tots and 'The Big Yum' at the Mountain Mandarin Festival in Auburn, CA.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Smothered to the Max
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes in for a full day of over-the-top, smothered goodness. Indulgent in every bite, these dishes range from drool-worthy, savory and sumptuous meals to mouthwatering, sticky, sweet and syrupy desserts.
