programme.title: The Loud House: Picture Perfect/ Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: The Loud House: One of the Boys/ A Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality.

programme.title: The Loud House: Ruthless People/ What Wood Lincoln Do?
programme.desc: When the house is infested with termites, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others with Aunt Ruth.Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: High Sea Diving/ Bottle Burglars
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean. When SpongeBob Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it's up to them to steal it back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Coupon/ Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it. Mr. Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Help Wanted/ Reef Blowers/ Tea at the Treedome
programme.desc: SpongeBob applies at the Krusty Krab; a mess ends up on Squidward's lawn; SpongeBob meets Sandy for tea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: It's Pony: Nosy Pony/ Beatrice
programme.desc: When Annie tries to stop Pony from being nosy, she creates a bigger problem that puts him in danger. When Annie takes pity on a lonely friend and lets her spend the day with Pony, she worries her friend is better at taking care of Pony than she is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Big Screen Buhdeuce/ Weekend at Furfle's
programme.desc: Buhdeuce is lured away from Breadwinning by the glitz and glamour of being a movie star. Later, Mrs. Furfle falls into a deep magical sleep and SwaySway and Buhdeuce pretend she's awake so she won't miss her date with T-Midi.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Pat make extra money when they decide to sell chocolate bars door to door. Also, Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy get into an fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus/ Suction Cup Symphony
programme.desc: Plankton builds a Roman coliseum, and puts on a free gladiator show featuring togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. / Squidward is determined to win the Bikini Bottom Symphony's composition contest, but SpongeBob and Patrick keep distracting him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: I, Breakfast Bot/ Dynamic Do-Over
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karate Chops/ Taco The Town
programme.desc: Used to being top dog, Carl can’t handle when Adelaide joins his karate class and becomes the star student./ Hector starts selling Rosa’s delicious tacos but gets overwhelmed when they’re more popular than the mercado!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Saving Face/ Matters of the Kart
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid are determined to find out if the new building tenant is their favorite wrestler – La Tormenta.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Snack Pact/ The Horror-Scope
programme.desc: The family finds a tamale cart and tries to keep it secret from Abuela. And, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction until it comes true.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: How to Train Your Carl/ Stress Test
programme.desc: Carl gets lost in the zoo after sneaking away from his family to find a Komodo dragon. The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Pictures of Boo
programme.desc: In need of shelter from a storm and desperately seeking sleep, the group of questers are welcomed into a mysterious house by a strange Colonel.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: I Will Survive
programme.desc: The questers finally reach Alvin’s lair, but must first overcome a series of traps before Brendar can finally reunite with her brother.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Chancla Force/ Fluff Love
programme.desc: Carl takes Rosa’s chancla, setting off the balance of order in the city, and calling the Chancla Force into action! Carlitos goes on a wild adventure to get his favorite stuffed animal from the arcade.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: My Leg!/ Ink Lemonade
programme.desc: Now that Fred's leg has healed up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way no matter what. Patrick's lemonade stand isn't doing too well until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Tooth, the Whole Tooth and Nothing but the Tooth/ Mutiny on the Krusty Krab
programme.desc: Krabs leads the Krusty Krab's crew and customers back home when a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away. Patrick is afraid to let go of his last baby tooth.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Wild Weekend/ For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before an academic contest.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Between a Rope and a Hard Place
programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Clowning Around/ Bully for You
programme.desc: Theodore is desperate to land the part of the monster in the school play, so Alvin decides to show Theodore how to really scare people. Simon builds a homemade robot body-guard, that helps him stand up to the bullies.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lights Camera Uh-Oh/ Wax Dave
programme.desc: The Chipmunks have 48 hours to help Jeanette make a student film. But every chipmunk has a very different movie in mind. The Chipmunks follow Dave and find out he's fallen in love with a dangerous woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Allergic Reaction/ Lice-enced to Teach
programme.desc: Theodore develops an allergy to an unknown ingredient; Jeanette and the Chipmunks try to rescue a chimpanzee Bocarter keeps in a cage.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A Mile in My Shoes/ Super Bike
programme.desc: Neither side appreciates what it takes to be a kid or a fairy godparent.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Sleep Over and Over/ Mother Nature
programme.desc: Chester and AJ are feuding and Timmy is caught in the middle; mom becomes a weathercaster.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Truth or Cosmoquences/ Beach Bummed
programme.desc: Cosmo wants help impressing people at his reunion; Timmy wishes he were stronger.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Catman Meets the Crimson Chin/ Genie Menie Minie Mo
programme.desc: The superhero TV show, 'Catman,' may be out of production, but its star, TV's Adam West will never rest as long as there are crimes to avenge. Timmy accidentally releases a Genie from a magic lava lamp.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Snack Pact/ The Horror-Scope
programme.desc: The family finds a tamale cart and tries to keep it secret from Abuela. And, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction until it comes true.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: How to Train Your Carl/ Stress Test
programme.desc: Carl gets lost in the zoo after sneaking away from his family to find a Komodo dragon. The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lock 'N Loud/ The Whole Picture
programme.desc: Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door; Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cooked!
programme.desc: The kids promise to help Dad with the grand opening of his new restaurant by coming up with promotions. But their lack of teamwork and crazy promos lead to an ultimate nightmare in the kitchen for Dad.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: All Aboard the Snakeybus
programme.desc: Jacksepticeye cruises around Miami in the Snakeybus, Pokimane goes for her first victory in Brawl Stars, and Markiplier takes his son for a wild ride in Guts N Glory.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Mountain Out of a Molehill
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: She's the Mayor/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: While Candace and Stacy's relationship is put to the test, Phineas and Ferb build the ultimate lemonade stand and begin to offer franchise opportunities. Candace is awarded the opportunity to be mayor for the day, which she uses to her advantage.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: We Call It Maze/ Ladies and Gentlemen, Meet Max Modem!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create a life sized maze filled with fun obstacles. But things don't go as planned when the Little Sparks try out the maze. Lawrence asks the boys to help him turn into a pop star so he can perform with Linda at a Lindana concert.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Mages and Mazes/ Okay Karaoke
programme.desc: The kids play a role-playing game at Remy's but his rules lead to conflict. The Greens go out for karaoke, but Tilly struggles to express her true self through song.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Missin' the Mission
programme.desc: Leo finally goes a mission with Davenport and Eddy in an attempt to stop an underground gas leak. Adam, Bree and Chase struggle to escape from Principal Perry's detention lockdown.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Speed Trapped
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase sneak out to meet Marcus in Davenport's new self-driving sports car.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bro Down
programme.desc: Chase outsmarts Adam with a prank that shatters his confidence; Chase in real danger.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Quarantined
programme.desc: Bree is exposed to a dangerous toxic chemical, sending Adam and Chase on a mission for an antidote. Bree escapes quarantine and when her side effects kick in it's up to Leo to get her back to her capsule.

programme.title: Lab Rats: The Rats Strike Back
programme.desc: The Lab Rats confide in Leo their frustrations at having to constantly train and their desire to do normal teenage things. Leo explains the concept of going on strike so they face off against Davenport, who calls their strike bluff and raises the stakes.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Parallel Universe
programme.desc: Leo is inadvertently sucked into Davenport's new invention and transported into a parallel universe where Tasha is a brilliant inventor, Davenport is her insecure assistant, and Leo finally has bionic abilities.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Spike's Got Talent
programme.desc: Leo sets out to sabotage Chase but inadvertently releases Chase’s rampaging alter ego 'Spike' to wreak havoc on the school.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Haunting of Mission Creek High, The
programme.desc: A teenager and his newfound 'siblings,' a trio of super-human teens, navigate high school.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Robot Fight Club
programme.desc: Chase and Leo enter a local 'create-your-own battle bot' competition where they hope to defeat the returning champion.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo vs. Evil
programme.desc: Leo follows Marcus to his secret lair to gather evidence that proves he’s bionic but ends up captured by Marcus.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: With Douglas now revealed as Marcus' master, the two infiltrate Davenport's lab and capture Davenport with plans on using him to lure Bree, Chase, and Adam.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Showdown
programme.desc: Now alone, except for Eddy, Leo must figure out how to rescue Davenport and the Lab Rats. Eddy shares with Leo Davenport's secret room in the lab where all of his most powerful inventions are stored.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: The Final Stage! Facing Aiger!
Phineas and Ferb: The Mom Attractor/ Cranius Maximus
programme.desc: Candice asks the boys to invent a device that attracts their mom so that she can bust her brothers. In the meantime, Dr. Doofenshmirtz invents a 'Baby-Cry-Inator.' The boys invent a cerebral stimulatory hat to help Baljeet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sipping With the Enemy/ Tri-State Treasure: Boot of Secrets
programme.desc: Candace tries to bust Phineas and Ferb when they put on an enormous backyard magic show. Vanessa and Major Monogram's son, Monty, get coffee together.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Military Makeover: Daniels Family: Episode 5
programme.desc: The Daniels Family reveal day episode; entertainment and technology solutions, to a surprise vacation.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: All I Could Do Was Cry
programme.desc: After several discussions with Dr. Herman, April and Jackson must face their situation head on and make a difficult decision regarding their unborn child. Catherine arrives in Seattle and bumps into Richard at the hospital.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Great Pretender
programme.desc: Maggie gets upset when Meredith dodges her questions about DC; Bailey and Ben become concerned about Ben's brother after he is admitted to the hospital, and Dr. Herman starts to warm up to Arizona.

programme.title: The Closer: Heroic Measures
programme.desc: A woman's son dies during surgery and Deputy Police Chief Brenda Johnson is called in.

programme.title: The Closer: The Other Woman
programme.desc: Brenda is called to testify in a case of Pope vs. Pope, a custody hearing between her boss and his ex wife. Brenda's team investigates a death of a woman whose identity may have been stolen by an addict.

programme.title: Major Crimes: A Rose Is a Rose
programme.desc: The squad investigates a double homicide related to an ongoing string of home invasions in the Hollywood Hills. Meanwhile, Sanchez attempts to reintegrate himself in the division after his suspension, and Capt. Raydor makes a fateful choice.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sorry I Missed You
programme.desc: When a dead body pops out of the trunk at the end of a car chase, the squad must untangle connections between a superstar chef, a pediatric psychiatrist and his second wife, and a bankruptcy lawyer.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Open Line
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a super model with close ties to a pompous celebrity photographer with boundary issues. Meanwhile, Raydor and Rusty give Assistant Chief Taylor a headache when they are both served subpoenas for the Alice murder case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Turn Down
programme.desc: During his first drive-along as a Reserve Officer, Buzz Watson discovers a dead body in a hotel room bathtub. This discovery not only threatens an extremely expensive wedding, but also Flynn and Provenza's plans to take the division to a Dodger's game.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Snitch
programme.desc: While the Major Crimes unit investigates a complicated gangland shooting, Det. Amy Sykes finds she must protect the identify of a witness capable of identifying the killer.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Enemy Next Door
programme.desc: Kevin Patrick Stoeser is caught looking at lewd pictures in a halfway house following his release. Knowing this will put him back behind bars, he flees and has been on the run ever since.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Factory of Death
programme.desc: After blackmailing his Southern California employers about their illegal employment practices, an undocumented factory worker vanishes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Tools of the Trade: Automation
programme.desc: Firefighters need their Alaskan homestead to function while they are away on duty.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Tools of the Trade: Water Tools
programme.desc: The Raneys face the power of water as they transport a cabin to a flood-proof foundation, and make a rice patty garden in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Tools of the Trade: Rebuilding
programme.desc: When a Northern California family loses their entire homestead in a wildfire, the Raneys give a masterclass on the work, and the equipment, needed to rebuild from nothing.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Sweet Homestead Alabama
programme.desc: The Raneys face an emotional rescue of young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama. To save the legacy of an 8th generation family property, they must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Sweet Homestead Alabama
programme.desc: The Raneys face an emotional rescue of young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama. To save the legacy of an 8th generation family property, they must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fury and Fire
programme.desc: Threatened by an approaching wildfire, Stuart and Toni Rinker need a quick solution to their failing Idaho homestead. The Raneys plan to fire-proof the Rinkers' cabin and build a firebreak.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Line of Fire
programme.desc: Marty has to create an evacuation ark for livestock while Matt devises a layer of fire protection to save a homestead in danger of a wildfire.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Dave returns to the Doodlebug Cut in hopes of beating their 400-oz season goal. But when the channel they're mining is lost, Dave tracks down the son of an old-timer who gives him a lead that could send them over the top.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Million Dollar Gamble
programme.desc: Dave makes a dramatic pitch to return to Lynx Creek for a shot at the team's first-ever million-dollar season. But Casey must find gold fast as Jason is hit with a bombshell that could end their Arizona adventure before it begins.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle
programme.desc: New technologies reveal the startling truth behind the largest temple ever built, Angkor Wat. Accompany experts as they uncover how this colossal structure was constructed and why one of the largest cities in the world was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for King Arthur's Castle
programme.desc: A castle in Scotland could be the home of King Arthur's legendary round table. Scientists have made a gruesome discovery at this mysterious site: a disfigured skeleton that could reveal the castle's bloody secrets and rewrite the history books.

programme.title: Unearthed: Sex, Lies, and the Taj Mahal
programme.desc: The Taj Mahal is one of the world's most beautiful monuments, but new investigations reveal its dark secrets. Scientists are uncovering codes that tell a shocking story of power and betrayal, challenging everything we thought we knew about the Taj Mahal.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Lost Skyscrapers
programme.desc: A ground-breaking experiment reveals how ancient Egyptians built the giant obelisks of Thebes, and new discoveries at this holy site could explain why these mysterious marvels triggered the downfall of the pharaohs and the end of Egypt's golden age.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Venice
programme.desc: Venice was once a fearsome superpower home to secrets, wealth, and treachery. Today, scientists use pioneering acoustic imaging technology to discover the city's ancient foundations and reveal how it's still standing.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Tempers get hot when survival tactics collide as Joe and Cody struggle to escape the Nicaraguan jungle.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Frying Pan
programme.desc: Deep in New Mexico's Chihuahuan Desert, Joe struggles to get out of an abandoned mineshaft.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Mars on Earth
programme.desc: Two guys with two completely opposing approaches to survival take on one of the most barren landscapes on the planet, Chile's Atacama Desert.

programme.title: Dual Survival: The Green Hell
programme.desc: Joe and Cody learn how to stay alive on the world's deadliest river, if they can keep from killing each other first.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Isolated in the jungle of an uninhabited Hawaiian island, Joe and Cody lock heads over priorities.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Winter's Warning
programme.desc: Team Turin races to smash their 400-ounce season goal in Hummocks gold. But the increasing amounts of heavy black sand, early snow and pressure from the local community threaten to derail their operation.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Justin's Story
programme.desc: A college graduate with a once-promising career, Justin has eaten his life away to the point of never leaving the house for anything but food. Now only the help of Dr. Now's weight-loss program can restore his hopes of living a happy, productive life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Supersized: Cystic River
programme.desc: Dennis has several giant growths on the back of his head. Juan has a rare condition he hopes Dr. Lee will understand. Natalie searches for answers as to why her body is covered in hundreds of mysterious dark bumps.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Isaac's Journey
programme.desc: Isaac helped raise his siblings after his mom suffered a debilitating stroke when he was 10. While learning to cook for his family, he began comfort-eating. Now to avoid eating himself to death, Isaac must learn to take care of himself for a change.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: The Kings: Parent Trapped
programme.desc: Casey reaches a boiling point with his parents when they blame his morbid obesity on video games. Amanda starts having pains post-surgery that send her to the E.R. Amy makes major lifestyle changes in the hopes of being approved for surgery.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Supersized: Cystic River
programme.desc: Dennis has several giant growths on the back of his head. Juan has a rare condition he hopes Dr. Lee will understand. Natalie searches for answers as to why her body is covered in hundreds of mysterious dark bumps.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Isaac's Journey
programme.desc: Isaac helped raise his siblings after his mom suffered a debilitating stroke when he was 10. While learning to cook for his family, he began comfort-eating. Now to avoid eating himself to death, Isaac must learn to take care of himself for a change.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: The Kings: Parent Trapped
programme.desc: Casey reaches a boiling point with his parents when they blame his morbid obesity on video games. Amanda starts having pains post-surgery that send her to the E.R. Amy makes major lifestyle changes in the hopes of being approved for surgery.

programme.title: Unexpected: Grandma Fail
programme.desc: Jenna and Aden introduce their family to baby Luca. Myrka worries that her stable home with Ethan's family is crumbling. Lilly and Lawrence worry for their baby's life when LJ is born completely silent.

programme.title: Unexpected: He Wasn't Breathing
programme.desc: Lilly and Lawrence bring their new baby home. Michelle shares devastating news with Ethan and Myrka. Tyra and Alex part ways.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Brittany, who was always the bridesmaid but now the bride, wants to 'drop it low' in a dress. Veronica is determined to make her second wedding perfect. Erika bought her dress four years ago and is now ready to walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Booby Trap
programme.desc: Danielle's size 34, J-cup chest is blowing her budget sky high. Stephanie wants to show off the goods, but her mother certainly does not. Christie purchased a dress to flaunt her bust, but after losing weight, she hopes it still does.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Afraid to Try New Things
programme.desc: Wedding planner Rachel is excited to try on dresses so edgy they might scare off other brides. Plus, Natalie also wants a unique gown, but she's worried about getting her traditional mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 'I'm a Firm Believer in Signs'
programme.desc: Bride Jenna is joined by her NFL player brother, Justin Pugh, who feels he's well-versed in fashion. Also, Talmesha wants a gown that will compliment a very special bouquet honoring her late father.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy, I Think I Got This
programme.desc: New consultant Shay is excited to help with a surprise marriage proposal, but trouble brews when he rejects Randy's offer to help. Former Miss USA Nia Sanchez has just one day to find her gown. Comedian Jamie learns dress shopping is no laughing matter.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That Looks Like a Torture Device
programme.desc: Bridget's feelings about the perfect dress for her wedding to pro snowboarder Scott Lago get turned upside-down by her opinionated entourage. Meanwhile, new mom Karyssa wants a dress with lots of coverage and Lauren hopes she fits into her gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: There's a New Guy in Town
programme.desc: Randy discovers major changes at Kleinfeld, the biggest of which is that the bridal shop hired its first male consultant. Bride Tolu contends with her opinionated sister, and Amanda fears her gown won't be modest enough for her orthodox wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Male Perspective

programme.desc: A Los Angeles couple can't wait to ditch their busy lives and head to the Manabi Province in Ecuador. They want to stay within a modest budget as renters and find a private place with at least two bedrooms and an outdoor area they can enjoy.

programme.title: Bargain Block: White Box and Cottage
programme.desc: Not everything goes to plan when Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas think they've caught a break with their next homes. Keith attempts an offbeat design with his all-wood White Box house, and Shea helps sell a cozy cottage that's out of their comp zone.

programme.title: Bargain Block: Calm Minds and Dark Moods
programme.desc: Evan and Keith hit some roadblocks on a house with hidden plumbing issues and another home with a fallen tree on its roof. Keith's mind spins in all directions as he transforms these problem properties into a peaceful haven and a boldly dark masterpiece.

programme.title: Bargain Block: Modern and Bohemian
programme.desc: Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas have unconventional plans for two decrepit houses. A fresh coat of black paint and a contemporary design brings the Mod House to life, while the Bohemian House becomes light and airy with the help of some peacock wallpaper.

programme.title: Bargain Block: Detroit Pride and Weird House

programme.title: Bargain Block: Safari and Country Estates

programme.title: Bargain Block: Craftsman and Classy Cape Cod

programme.title: Bargain Block: Farmhouse and Schoolhouse

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unspeakable
programme.desc: Sandra and Jamie Melgar were high school sweethearts who were celebrating their 32nd anniversary. Then, the intimate evening turned deadly. To crack the case, investigators had to uncover the secrets of an illusion worthy of the great Houdini.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Farm
programme.desc: Bill and Shirley Carter had raised a family on their sprawling farm in America's heartland. As their golden years approached, tragedy struck and the seeds of a mystery pitting one family member against another had been planted.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Nikki Whitehead was a single mom working toward a brighter future. She found love, moved into a nice neighborhood and enrolled in college. Then, tragedy struck. Police searched for answers but one thing was certain. This crime was personal.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Out There
programme.desc: One murder in broad daylight. Then another brutal attack almost exactly a year later. Police discovered a chilling connection between the victims, and many feared they had a serial killer on their hands. It was a race to connect the dots.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Everything She Knew
programme.desc: Amber Belken was a young woman with big dreams. Then, she was found murdered. Was Amber the victim of a robbery gone wrong or was this brutal crime personal? Three people knew the truth. Two of them would risk their lives to reveal it.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unraveled
programme.desc: For an agonizing four days, the fear was paralyzing. A city was under siege. Six people had been gunned down, but how were the killings linked? A retired detective connected the dots, initiating the manhunt for a man with a gun and a grudge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: Melvin Roberts was larger than life. Former mayor. Prominent attorney. He even had a street named after him. When cops found him dead in his driveway, it marked the start of a tough case. In addition to friends, Melvin Roberts had plenty of enemies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Halloween Moon
programme.desc: It was just before Halloween. Joel Lovelien and his fiancé headed to a local bar packed with people in costume. Then, Joel stepped outside and walked into a troubling mystery. Police rounded up potential suspects, but could they unmask a killer?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Evil Was Waiting
programme.desc: Vince Goslyn found his calling in the military. His career was thriving and he had built a beautiful family. Then one night, the father of five was gunned down. Did his decision to help someone in need cost him his life or was he targeted?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Execution Enigma
programme.desc: Investigators suspect foul play when they discover a mysterious body lying dead along a lonely stretch of New Mexico highway. But the bizarre trail of evidence only deepens the dark enigma surrounding a seemingly well-respected family man.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: An elderly matriarch is found dead in her home outside of Boston after an apparent accidental fall down her stairs. With the help of a confidential informant, police obtain shocking audio that reveals the painful truth behind her death.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Deadly Dose
programme.desc: In the early morning hours after Valentine's Day a man is found dead after an apparent drug overdose. But a jail informant gives investigators a tip that abruptly changes the case, and a deadly pattern of deaths in the family is revealed.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Vanished with the Tides
programme.desc: A Florida man's body washes ashore on idyllic Cocoa Beach, the apparent victim of an accidental drowning. But as investigators pull back the layers of the victim's personal life, a far murkier truth is revealed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Unusual Suspect
programme.desc: It was in the still of the night when it started. A cold-blooded serial killer, lurking in the woods, peeping through windows and stalking for his next victim. It's a tale that would be hard to believe, if it didn't really happen.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets of the Snake River
programme.desc: Rachel Anderson was a vivacious single mom whose world revolved around her children. When she failed to show up for work one day, her kids panicked. Might her disappearance have anything to do with those terrifying phone calls she'd been receiving?

programme.title: Mysteries & Scandals

programme.title: Manson: The Women

programme.title: Green River Killer

programme.title: Kemper on Kemper: Lost Case Files

programme.title: Dahmer On Dahmer: Lost Case Files

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: The Countdown
programme.desc: The world falls in love with a heartbroken Princess Diana and grieves her passing. Americans are shocked by the senseless killings at Columbine, and surprised by the 1998 midterm elections. 'The West Wing' reaches TV screens; Lewinsky affair continues.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: America Goes to War

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Reality Bites
programme.desc: We tell the story of the early '90s growing obsession with sex, celebrity and reality TV. While some women, like Anita Hill, are fighting against becoming sex objects, others like Anna Nicole Smith can’t wait to get their clothes off.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Enemy Within

programme.desc: When fight-or-flight instincts kick in, anything is possible and animals will go to extremes to survive.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: Ambushed
programme.desc: From sudden shocks and blindsiding attacks, to jaw dropping body slams and bone-rattling collisions, the animal kingdom is full of astonishing ambushes.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Close Encounters
programme.desc: Josh begins his search for extraterrestrial life with an once-in-a-lifetime visit to NASA. He then hunts for evidence of aliens in Chile, where he views a UFO video captured by the military and assists scientists at the largest telescope on Earth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Ancient Visitors
programme.desc: Josh's journey continues on remote Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe extraterrestrials visited millennia ago. He then visits the site of a recent meteorite strike in Zimbabwe that could prove life on Earth began in outer space.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: UFOs Over England
programme.desc: The hunt for alien life continues in Zimbabwe, where Josh interviews witnesses from one of the largest UFO sightings in modern history. Then, in England, he investigates the infamous case that has become known as 'Europe's Roswell.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Roswell Revealed
programme.desc: Josh's epic search for extraterrestrial life comes to a close in the USA, where a legendary investigation team brings him to a hot case in Arkansas. Then, he visits with a researcher who may have new information on the mother of all UFOs.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Death Fortress
programme.desc: A desert island adrift in the Gulf of Mexico contains a massive and marooned structure with a contagious past. Experts investigate and uncover a desolate military fortress turned prison and plagued by a deadly disease.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Black Mirror
programme.desc: The Obsidian Mirror is a mysterious artifact crafted from volcanic rock, and it's said to be a supernatural device used to communicate with angels and spirits. Experts use cutting-edge tech to discover who made this strange relic and why.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Secrets of the Star Disk
programme.desc: An ancient bronze disk adorned with gold may contain the oldest images of the cosmos ever discovered; using new research and the latest tech, experts investigate if this artifact could be the work of a prehistoric astrologer or just an elaborate hoax.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Death Fortress
programme.desc: A desert island adrift in the Gulf of Mexico contains a massive and marooned structure with a contagious past. Experts investigate and uncover a desolate military fortress turned prison and plagued by a deadly disease.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Black Mirror
programme.desc: The Obsidian Mirror is a mysterious artifact crafted from volcanic rock, and it's said to be a supernatural device used to communicate with angels and spirits. Experts use cutting-edge tech to discover who made this strange relic and why.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Secrets of the Star Disk
programme.desc: An ancient bronze disk adorned with gold may contain the oldest images of the cosmos ever discovered; using new research and the latest tech, experts investigate if this artifact could be the work of a prehistoric astrologer or just an elaborate hoax.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Roswell Revealed
programme.desc: Josh's epic search for extraterrestrial life comes to a close in the USA, where a legendary investigation team brings him to a hot case in Arkansas. Then, he visits with a researcher who may have new information on the mother of all UFOs.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets of Time Travel
programme.desc: Time travel might be more possible than we ever imagined, and today, cutting-edge technology and the latest research into black holes and wormholes is helping experts get steps closer to discovering how to travel through time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Universe's Deadliest
programme.desc: The universe is a dangerous place, and we explore the deadliest spots in the cosmos. Between earth and the edge of the universe, there are a million ways to die, and our crash test dummy is on a mission to reveal the worst.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Search for a Second Earth
programme.desc: Astronomers seek the answer to a second earth with spectroscopy, direct imaging and telescopes. They hope to find evidence of atmospheres, magnetospheres and signs of life.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Omen of the Pharaoh's Wail
programme.desc: At the tomb of one 3,000-year-old Egyptian pharaoh, experts report that the massive statues that guard the site can sing; using cutting-edge technology, investigators hunt for an explanation for this mysterious phenomenon.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: The Ghost on the Radio
programme.desc: When someone picks up a radio distress call from a seven-year-old boy lost alone in the desert, authorities embark on a search-and-rescue mission to find him; as the hunt continues, the case becomes more and more mysterious.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: To Catch a UFO
programme.desc: An intercept pilot chases a UFO only to vanish forever, then, a mysterious hum plagues 2% of the planet.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning
programme.desc: A Russian radio station has broadcast a signal nonstop since the Cold War, and no one knows why; experts use hi-tech methods to investigate what it is, and what might happen if it ever stops.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: No Harmony in Polyamory
programme.desc: An open-minded foursome soon discovers there's no harmony in polyamory, and someone will pay the ultimate price for free love.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Innocent blood spills when these deadly women reach their tipping point.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mid Life Murder
programme.desc: These Deadly Women didn't grow old gracefully; they committed 'Mid-Life Murder.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are unthinkable.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tainted Love
programme.desc: When love turns to obsession, these women make their lover their possession.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Fence Face Off
programme.desc: Complaints about dogs running loose lead to the construction of a fence between two long-time neighbors, but the problem isn't solved and flaring tempers lead to fist fights, stabbings, and ultimately a shocking shootout captured on video.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Backyard Blood
programme.desc: A man's dream comes true when he buys his parents' house and moves his family into it, only to discover that his neighbor on the other side of the fence holds a decades-long grudge against him that won't resolve until one of them lies dead.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tainted Love
programme.desc: When love turns to obsession, these women make their lover their possession.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Fence Face Off
programme.desc: Complaints about dogs running loose lead to the construction of a fence between two long-time neighbors, but the problem isn't solved and flaring tempers lead to fist fights, stabbings, and ultimately a shocking shootout captured on video.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Not in My Yard
programme.desc: A rash of break-ins shatters the peace in a tight community, and when residents take sides along the fault lines; good friends turn into deadly enemies.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mid Life Murder
programme.desc: These Deadly Women didn't grow old gracefully; they committed 'Mid-Life Murder.'

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Therapy on Ice
programme.desc: When violin prodigy Lia Tricomo seeks the help of therapist John Alkins, they connect over a shared love of music. When John finds it impossible to resist his troubled patient, the consequences of indulging his forbidden passion will prove deadly.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Mystery Down Under
programme.desc: A dream honeymoon on the Great Barrier Reef ended with Tina Watson drowned and her husband accused of murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Searching for Sherri
programme.desc: A young mother vanishes while out jogging. A frantic search is mounted. Then, just as suddenly, three weeks later she reappears, battered and bruised and her long blond hair chopped off.

programme.title: Rodney King: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: In 1992 Los Angeles, the brutal police beating of Rodney King is caught on video, igniting outrage. When the officers are let off, fury is unleashed. With testimony from LA residents, this is an intimate account of those dark days.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Who Killed Jane Doe 59?
programme.desc: Police search for the name of an unidentified woman murdered in 1969 and the person who killed her. The one lead that keeps coming up is Charles Manson and the Manson Family.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Killing Field
programme.desc: The parents of a young South Carolina couple are terrified when they go missing in 2016. Detectives find a clue that leads to strange storage container in the middle of 95 acres. What's inside unlocks secrets of a monster hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fallen Angels
programme.desc: In 2002 a 12-year-old girl from Oregon City, OR goes missing on her way to school and the whole town is clamoring to find her. The police investigation offers little in the way of leads, and then the unthinkable happens - a second girl disappears.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Watch Dogs
programme.desc: After getting an alert on his computer, a man races home to confront two men burglarizing his home. Then, a woman and her child are defenseless when a strange man enters their home until their 122-pound Great Dane springs into action.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: A strange man violently attempts to kidnap a woman's children, but a 16-year old wrestler saves the day. And then, when a frightening cab robbery takes place in broad daylight, someone unexpected comes to the rescue.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: In 1979 6-year-old Etan Patz walked out of his New York City home headed for a school bus stop two blocks away, and has not been seen since. 48 Hours investigates the disappearance and the man charged with killing Etan.

programme.title: Shattered: The House on Hamilton Avenue
programme.desc: In 2006, Officer Mike Kermon is the first to arrive at a house on Hamilton Avenue where neighbors believe shots have been fired. As he enters the quiet home, he has no idea that what he'll find inside will change his life forever.

programme.title: Disappeared: The Vanishing Hour
programme.desc: 19 year old Tyarra Williams vanishes from the parking lot of her Greensboro, North Carolina apartment complex. When tips suggest that Tyarra may have fallen prey to human trafficking, her grandfather embarks on a cross country search for answers.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Richard Davis runs up to an ambulance parked at a gas station, clutching a gunshot wound to his abdomen. He is rushed to a hospital, but sadly succumbs to his injuries and now it's up to Atlanta's elite homicide unit to figure out what happened.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Murdered for Money
programme.desc: When a dismembered body is found on the edge of Phoenix, it turns out to be travelling jewellery salesman Jay Orbin. While he adored his exotic dancer wife Marjorie, turns out she had a few lovers on the side, giving police several suspects.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: She Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: When exotic dancer Anson 'Buzz' Clinton is found shot to death by the side of the highway, it looks like a drug deal gone bad. But the investigation leads police officers into a tangled murdered plot involving crooked lawyers and a family bent on revenge.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Great Escapes
programme.desc: Four stories highlighting great escapes; a monocular that helped save a stranded pilot; the rifle that helped a WWII hero cheat death; the hand-drawn map used to destroy SAM sites; and a Saint's medal that served as one scout pilot's lucky charm.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Four stories Behind Enemy Lines; goggles that shed light on the final mission of WWII; court documents detail a killer's last stand; a pistol signifies bravery for covert ops in Vietnam; a baseball signed by a ballplayer who became much more.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Heroes
programme.desc: Four stories of heroism; A golden statue for Marines shooting a battle; The medal of honor for a daring train robbery; A General's plans that led the U.S. into WWII; and a piece of paper that spells death for Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Four different stories that of events that happened against all odds.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool for a Dream Home
programme.desc: The kings create a resort in a family's backyard that includes a waterfall grotto with a slide and infinity edge. Additional elements include a splash pad and sun shelf, transforming the yard from barren to beautiful.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Rivers and a Pool
programme.desc: A couple want an alluring yard that incorporates the beauty of their cliff-side property. The enlarged yard area gets a deck bisected by a faux stream, a feature-filled pool with stone slab bridge, jumping boulders and even a slide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Caribbean Spa
programme.desc: With three energetic kids and lots of friends, a family needs a pool to keep everyone entertained. They create a masterpiece that includes a huge deck for Dad, a Baja shelf for Mom and multiple water features.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Pools and Greens Make Happy Teens
programme.desc: A couple wants to keep their two golf-obsessed teenage sons and their friends busy in the yard, and a pool with a putting and chipping green attached is the perfect setup.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: In Over Their Head
programme.desc: A couple that gets in way over their heads with a DIY renovation call in David and Michelle Jaime to help tackle the job.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Breezeblock Build
programme.desc: A family that has lived all over the world hires David and Michelle Jaime to make their home feel truly Hawaiian.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: A couple reaches a standstill during demolition, so David and Michelle come to the rescue to save their remodel.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Hawaiian Shirt Renovation
programme.desc: Daniel, Kahina and their new baby live in a charming house built in 1931, but the miniscule master closet is being overrun by Daniel's Hawaiian shirt collection.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Ohana New Kitchen
programme.desc: Michelle and David Jaime rearrange a whole house for a growing family in need of a new kitchen, dining room and master bedroom.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Third-Generation Renovation
programme.desc: David and Michelle Jaime take on Kimo and Jodie's third-generation house, which was built by Jodie's grandparents in the 1950s.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Enchanted in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Out of Date in the Outer Banks
programme.desc: With two active children and busy jobs, Stacey and Doug are hoping to find a beach house in the Outer Banks of North Carolina to give their family a place to relax and recharge. They find a home, but it must be renovated from top to bottom.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Margate, New Jersey
programme.desc: Sharon hunts for a beachfront home where she and her kids can rediscover the magic of the Jersey Shore. With a tight budget and a big wish list, they hope to pull off all the renovations and create the family retreat of their dreams.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories in Maryland
programme.desc: Frequent visitors to the popular beach town of Ocean City, MD, decide to take a big chance and invest in property for their family.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New England
programme.desc: We're in New England, the birthplace of the American Revolution, for some of our favourite food. We sample Boston cream pie, sticky buns, and Szechuan sliced fish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right
programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Delhi
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Delhi, India's capital and home to roughly 24 million people.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puglia
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Puglia, a coastal region in the heel of Italy's boot. The area's simple but stunning dishes include orecchiette pasta, grilled octopus and stuffed pasticiotti pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: San Diego
programme.desc: From wild vegetables to wild animals, Andrew gets a taste of the unexpected when he visits San Diego.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Explore the branches of the food scene in the nation's capital with Andrew Zimmern.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Trial By Fire
programme.desc: Three chefs hit the grills running in the Wildfire round as they fight to make it past the first elimination. The competition gets a bit cheeky in the Crossfire round, and the judges are treated to an open fire East Coast feast in the final round.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Tybee Island

programme.desc: A 50s-themed cake with a working jukebox is music to everyone's ears and an out-of-this-world wedding cake gets filled with hand-sculpted edible zombies! Next, an alligator groom's cake looks like it crawled right out of the swamp.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Cities, Skates and Jellyfish Cakes

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Mint For Each Other

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Brothers Sumit and Swithin are both recently engaged, so their mother Rani is throwing a dual traditional Indian engagement party with over 300 guests. Mom has her heart set on a traditional Indian show-stopper cake, but the brothers, not so much.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Double Trouble
